results.rendered_html:
sam-e (-ā √5. i) P. -aiti (pr. p. -eyAna,  MBh. ), to come together, approach together, meet at or in (acc. or loc.) or with (instr. with or without samam), go to or across, arrive at (acc.),  RV.  &c. &c.;
to unite with (instr.) in marriage,  R. ;
to enter,  Hit. ;
to emulate, cope with (acc.),  R. ;
(with yogam) to lead or join together, form an alliance between (gen.) and (instr.),  ŚvetUp.  (= saṃ-gamayya,  Śaṃk. )

2 To go through, march across.
